# Zac & Will's Lawyers

> Compensation and injury lawyers acting for people, not insurers. Practice
> areas: personal injury, workers' compensation, medical negligence, and motor
> vehicle accidents. First consultation is free.

This site is a public marketing front-end. Human visitors can check
eligibility, send an enquiry, book a consultation, and reschedule or cancel a
booking. All actions that touch personal data are protected by Cloudflare
Turnstile and proxied server-side; the browser never contacts the booking
backend directly.

## Pages

- [Practice areas & eligibility](/services.html): What we take on, plus a quick eligibility check.
- [Book a consultation](/book.html): Choose a matter type, view available times, and book.
- [Send an enquiry](/enquiry.html): Tell us what happened and we'll be in touch.
- [Manage your booking](/manage.html): Reschedule or cancel — confirmed via an emailed PIN.

## Agent access (MCP)

AI assistants can act on behalf of users via MCP at
https://zacwill.customer-gateway.com/mcp

Capabilities: check eligibility, view availability, book a consultation, submit
enquiries. Changing or cancelling a booking requires an email PIN confirmation
(a 6-digit code, valid for 10 minutes, up to 5 attempts).

Service IDs: personal_injury, workers_compensation, medical_negligence,
motor_vehicle_accident.
